g.onclick: sendPrompt('What HTTP fields go into the fingerprint hash?')
sendPrompt('How is the URI used in the fingerprint?')
sendPrompt('How is the request body hashed?')
sendPrompt('Why is the dedup: prefix used in the Redis key?')
sendPrompt('What does a real Redis key look like?')
sendPrompt('What does SET NX PX mean in Redis?')
g.text: NX = only set if not exists

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the dedup service return when a request is allowed?')
sendPrompt('What does the 409 Conflict response contain?')

svg.text: key auto-expires after window (default 10 s) — same request allowed again after expiry
